body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201522588EEE23473B7B62F97D5B"}"},"total":9025},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7229204058169410307","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我现在看到神话世界了，越到后面越精彩，前面写的确实有点毒，瑕不掩瑜，无论是道王还是天帝，易，疯道人等角色都有各自的特点，主角前期因为实力原因和天机阁的限制，不能遨游世界，真正入世，再第二个世界，主角就入世了，第三个世界主角属于超脱，行走于寰宇，但不入世，主角的性格什么也在一步步潜移默化的改变，第一世界的主角还有这现代人的思想，比较跳脱，但是后面的主角真的就做到了超脱。幕后流小说已经很不错了，从半无敌到真正无敌，主角也在成长的，不过不是实力的成长，而是性格的成长。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683180335,"group_id":"6993202005611121701","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2995513421204471"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6993202005611121701","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.08093935e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":108093,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":64},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7227764816294511400","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书主打的就是剧情新颖，没什么特别惊艳的地方，还有一些小小的毒点，但是瑕不掩瑜，可以在我严重书荒的时候解救我一把，必须五星[捂脸]现在很多书都剧情太过老套，拾人牙慧，这本书最起码设定上我是第一次见，给五星没啥毛病。主角是无敌的，但他是局限性的无敌，只在自己的一亩三分地无敌，我也是刚开始看，所以也没看到太多值得吐槽的地方，写的还是挺不错的，无聊的时候看看，解解闷没啥毛病。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682845231,"group_id":"6993202005611121701","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"青莲池上客，三品青莲入凡尘。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N24ICqLSgt3cgdbQjdhPCWmp2NVN81eTVoAkGhopddVl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa34e76d46e648d589fffaacc23ed9be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532454&x-signature=0E1VdghR32nZ9pIanqHxF%2FNSzVY%3D","user_id":"2995513421204471","user_name":"九域青莲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2995513421204471","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1773424913,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6993202005611121701","book_info":{"abstract":"叶旭穿越玄幻世界，觉醒天机系统，开局就获得一座天机阁。
晓未来通古今，批阴阳断五行。
天道之下，世间种种，天机阁都能推算出来。
紫薇大帝：“朕横推寰宇，天下无敌，居然在大帝榜上排名第十一？”
道王：“弑师夺位的事，纯属子虚乌有……我求求你，你别说了。”
无相魔尊：“天杀的天机阁主，他奶奶的，老子隐姓埋名，连脸都不要了，那群女人被他指点一下，居然又找过来了！”
……
我，天机阁主，打钱！
你想知道的，我都能让你知道！
一个人，搅乱一个世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/358164cd99933bdae4cd358f0c6318f9","author":"功夫咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"6993202005611121701","book_name":"玄幻：开局一座天机阁","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6998550557598155277","read_count":"51318","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3267010"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1336","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/99741568669b40701765205e2270a678~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175378&x-signature=ObLx6yZSqSDJ7Pnrpeip9J6Hme4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.014035e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201522588EEE23473B7B62F97D5B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10140,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":20090},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_po
